params.name: Monkey on Vigil
params.description: Although at first glance it is just a statue of a monkey with dark circles, its seemingly simple but exquisite costumes, lifelike facial expressions, and the fineness of each hair express to its audience that it may be a masterpiece from an unknown master craftsman.
